title: OFFO Shower Slide Bar with 6 Modes Shower Head Set, 1.5m Stainless Steel Hose,Adjustable 70cm Riser Rail and High Pressure Handheld Showerhead,Chrome
features: [6 Spray Modes Shower head] The 13cm diameter handheld shower head includes 6 spray modes: oxygenated shower spray, rain, rain+massage, massage, massage+power wash, power wash. You can choose the massage mode to let you relax with a hot shower. Easily changed the modes by the button.

[Adjustable Shower Slide Bar] The 70cm slide bar with shower head holder ,installation distance can be adjusted at will between 38-66cm,makes it easy to adjust the handheld shower height, the slide holder can freely move and get 360°rotation, flexibly meet the needs of each family member with different heights and shower angles.

[1.5m Premium Shower Hose] A Anti-kink stainless steel shower hose for handheld shower is equipped. No need to worry about adaptability. its sprinkler connection can be freely rotated, effectively prevents the hose from knotting and tangling, making it easier to take a bath. This shower hose is high temperature resistance, explosion-proof and leak-proof.

[Package Included] One 6-spray modes high pressure shower head, one 70cm adjustable shower slide bar and one 1.5m stainless steel anti-kink shower hose, all you need for an ultimate shower experience is in one package. Purchase in sets for convenience, consistent style, more aesthetically pleasing.

[After-sales Service] In case of any problems or complaints during use or installation, please don’t hesitate to contact us and we will respond with solutions within 24 hours. It’s always our persistence and belief to provide high-quality products and satisfactory customer services.
description: Product Description OFFO Other Bathroom Products Shower Head PVC Shower Hose Metal Shower Hose Cover Size 13cm Size 1.2m-3.0m Size 1.2m-5.0m Color Chrome Color Sliver,White,Matte Black Color Chrome,Matte Black Loosen the handle on the left side of the picture above to slide the slider up and down to adjust the height of the shower you like. Please pay attention to the direction of the shower holder, the side with the larger opening facing upwards. If there is a gap after plugging hand shower, please try to rotate the holder 180°.
